events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: isolation reading was 327 microns (good deep vacuum), but the 10‑minute standing decay reading was 1880 microns — a rise of ~1553 microns (~155 microns/min). That magnitude of climb indicates the system is not leak-tight or still has moisture/non-condensables present, so it fails the decay test. Disposition: `fail`, non-compliant, do not charge — perform a leak search and/or additional evacuation with a nitrogen sweep, then retest before charging.
